---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature'
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type
<!-- Please select one -->
- [ ] New programming language support
- [ ] Additional solution approach for existing problem
- [ ] Improved tooling and scripts
- [ ] Documentation improvements
- [ ] Testing enhancements
- [ ] Repository structure improvements
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why would it be valuable? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed implementation approach -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Implementation Details
<!-- If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, please share them -->

### For New Language Support:
<!-- Fill this section if requesting a new programming language -->
- **Language**: <!-- e.g., Rust, Go, TypeScript -->
- **Why this language**: <!-- Justification for adding this language -->
- **Community interest**: <!-- Evidence of interest from the community -->
- **Tooling availability**: <!-- Compilers, testing frameworks, etc. -->

### For New Solution Approaches:
<!-- Fill this section if suggesting alternative solution approaches -->
- **Problem(s)**: <!-- Which problems would benefit from this -->
- **Approach name**: <!-- e.g., Dynamic Programming, Sliding Window -->
- **Complexity improvement**: <!-- Better time/space complexity? -->

### For Tooling Improvements:
<!-- Fill this section if suggesting script/tooling improvements -->
- **Current limitation**: <!-- What doesn't work well currently -->
- **Proposed improvement**: <!-- How would you improve it -->
- **Impact**: <!-- Who would benefit and how -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, examples, or screenshots about the feature request here -->
